message:
Add theme-adaptive structural colors to analytics charts

Introduce ChartColors struct that provides dark-mode and light-mode
aware color palettes for all chart rendering elements:

- Define structural colors for axes, labels, gridlines, tooltips, and
  highlights that adapt based on the current theme mode
- Replace all hardcoded gray tones throughout chart renderers (session
  timeline, agent distribution, cost/token charts) with calls to
  ChartColors::for_theme(dark_mode)
- Refine analytics view rendering and state transition logic in app.rs
  to coordinate with the new theme-aware color system

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
